summary: Tested Cast System v2 for CineWorld Studio's. All features working: 700 cast members (400 actors, 100 directors, 100 screenwriters, 100 composers), variable skills, 5 categories, primary/secondary skills display, category/skill filtering, and bonus/malus system.

minor.issue: Cast pool not automatically initialized - must call /api/cast/initialize endpoint first
minor.workaround: Tests now auto-initialize cast pool on first API call

passed_tests: GET /api/actors - Returns 400 actors total with variable skills
GET /api/directors - Returns 100 directors total with variable skills
GET /api/screenwriters - Returns 100 screenwriters total with variable skills
GET /api/composers - Returns 100 composers total with variable skills
Filter by category works (e.g., ?category=star returns only star category)
Filter by skill works (e.g., ?skill=action returns actors with action skill)
Combined filters work (category + skill together)
GET /api/cast/bonus-preview - Returns correct bonus/malus calculation
GET /api/cast/skills - Returns translated skills for role types
Primary skills (2) correctly identified in API response
Secondary skill correctly identified in API response
Category distribution across 5 categories (recommended, star, known, emerging, unknown)
Total cast count is 700 members
UI Wizard Step 4 (Writer) - Shows 40 screenwriters with filters and skills
UI Wizard Step 5 (Director) - Shows 40 directors with filters and skills
UI Wizard Step 6 (Composer) - Shows 40 composers with filters and skills
UI Wizard Step 7 (Cast) - Shows 40 actors with filters and skills
UI shows category filter dropdown ('All', filter options)
UI shows skill filter dropdown ('All skills', filter options)
UI shows primary skills as yellow badges next to name
UI shows secondary skill as gray badge next to name

variable_skills.details: Each cast member has a VARIABLE subset of skills (3-6 skills each). Verified multiple unique skill combinations exist among cast members.

5_categories.details: Categories: recommended, star, known, emerging, unknown - all populated with cast members

primary_secondary_skills_display.details: Primary skills (top 2) shown as yellow badges, secondary skill shown as gray badge next to name

bonus_malus_system.details: Actors with matching genre skills get bonus, actors without get malus. Skill level determines bonus percentage.

critical_code_review_comments: Cast pool initialization should be automatic on app startup, not require manual /api/cast/initialize call
Consider adding 'has worked with us' indicator more prominently in UI

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI features displaying correctly in wizard steps 4-7)

seed_data_creation: Cast pool of 700 members initialized via /api/cast/initialize
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cast system v2 is fully working. 700 members created (400 actors, 100 directors, 100 screenwriters, 100 composers). Each member has variable skills (3-6 out of possible skills). UI wizard steps 4-7 show cast selection with category/skill filters. Bonus/malus system calculates based on actor skills vs film genre. To test: ensure /api/cast/initialize is called if database is empty.
screenshots: .screenshots/step7_cast_full.png - Actor selection with categories and skills
